name: Crossroad Cranberry-Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
2/3 cup Oats
1 cup Brown sugar
1/2 cup Flour
1/2 teaspoon Cinnamon
1/2 cup Butter; cut into 1/2-inch squares
Peel and slice the apples, then add them to the lemon juice. In a separate bowl, combine all other filling ingredients. Make the topping in another bowl. Place the apple mixture in a pie shell. Sprinkle the topping generously over the apple mixture. Arrange the butter squares on top. Bake at 300°F for 1.5 to 1.75 hours.
Source: CrossRoads Restaurant, Raleigh, NC
